name: Marukai Wholesale Mart
tagline: Hawaii's first warehouse-style Japanese market — fresh bentos, sushi counters, and Japanese snacks you can't find anywhere else.
talkStory: Marukai is a Japanese discount warehouse that locals have relied on for decades. The daily bento selection is legendary — arrive before lunch for the widest variety of freshly made boxes. The poke and sushi counters rival dedicated restaurants at a fraction of the price. Stock up on Japanese snacks, kitchenware, and specialty ingredients you won't find at Safeway. Membership not required for food purchases.
